# CWE-78 negative: fixed argv without shell interpolation (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-78-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"
	"regexp"
)

// CWE-78 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command (mitigated)
func TraceRoute(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	host := r.URL.Query().Get("host")
	if !regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$`).MatchString(host) {
		http.Error(w, "invalid host", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	cmd := exec.Command("traceroute", "-m", "1", host)
	out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "trace failed", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/plain")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(out)
}
